nasb.text: Now these were the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn was Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second was Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelitess;

esv.text: These are the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelite; the second, Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelite,

cnv.text: 大衛在希伯崙所生的兒子是：長子暗嫩，是耶斯列人亞希暖生的；次子但以利，是迦密人亞比該生的；

ccb.text: 以下是大卫在希伯仑生的儿子：长子暗嫩，由耶斯列人亚希暖所生；次子但以利，由迦密人亚比该所生；
